words.en: you (informal, as opposed to courteous 您)
he; him (used for either sex when the sex is unknown or unimportant)
(after a suppositional clause) in that case; then
can; to have the skill; to know how to
(negative prefix for verbs) have not; not
bar (loanword) (serving drinks, or providing Internet access etc)
to know; to become aware of
used in 家伙 and 家俱
to love; to be fond of; to like
particle indicating that a previously asked question is to be applied to the preceding word ("What about ...?", "And ...?")
to like; to be fond of
abbr. for Xinjiang 疆 or Singapore 坡
to think that ...; to feel that ...
to press charges; to file a complaint

first month of the lunar year
you (courteous, as opposed to informal 你)
to send; to deliver; to transmit
plural marker for pronouns, and nouns referring to individuals
the Great Learning, one of the Four Books 四书 in Confucianism
